title: Bracket
description: The World Cup knockout bracket, from the Round of 32 to the Final. It fills in as each match is decided.
descriptionCompare: The real bracket so far, with the teams you correctly predicted to reach each round checked in green.
descriptionSimulate: Play out the knockouts your way. Re-pick any winner from the Round of 32 on and the rest of the bracket updates instantly. It's just for fun — your Pick'em stays untouched.

legend.title: Compare
legend.correctHelp: a team you correctly predicted to reach this round
legend.scoringTitle: Points for advancing past a round

simulator.disclaimer: What-if mode — tap a team to send it through. Your Pick'em isn't affected.

share.shareText: Here's how I see the World Cup 2026 knockouts playing out.
